text:
The Battle of Heaven and Earth was the final offensive effort made by the unified remnant forces of the Marleyan military, the Warrior Unit, and the Survey Corps against the holder of the Founding Titan, Eren Yeager, in a desperate attempt to bring an end to the Rumbling. Other articles with this name include:

Battle of Heaven and Earth (Anime) - The anime version of the aforementioned event.
The Battle of Heaven and Earth (Chapter) - The 135th chapter of the Attack on Titan manga.
The Battle of Heaven and Earth (Episode) - The 91st episode of the Attack on Titan anime.
